flogeres-with-goat-cheese-argiro.name: Bloggers With Goat Cheese
instructions: Fine chop the figs and add them to a small pot.
Add the wine and honey and let them boil.
Lower the heat, cover the vessel and simmer for 10 minutes, melt the syrup and soften the figs.
Remove and draw some pieces of fig for the filling.
Open one crust left on the counter, cut it into 4 pieces and rub with olive oil.
Sprinkle along one end of each piece with some fresh thyme, stick to the surface of the oily Leaf.
Turn two million a Leaf, seal the thyme. This tip with thatme will be the closure of the roll so it can be seen.
On the opposite side of the pie, add some goat cheese and 2-3 small pieces of fig.
Wrap it in a roll, think as a cigar, rolling it towards the edge with thyme.
Similarly, we make the rest of the rolls and add them to a baking pan line with non-stick paper.
Brush them with some olive oil.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180
Serve them at room temperature and accompany them with the remaining pieces of fig and syrup.
Flores with cheese also match sweet sour tomato sauce.

falafel-spiced-tomatoes-and-chickpeas-on.name: Falafel-spiced Tomatoes And Chickpeas On Flatbread

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: a tart, citrusy spice, can be found at Middle Eastern markets and specialty foods stores.

instructions: Combine garlic, sumac, red pepper flakes, coriander, cumin, and 1 tsp. salt in a small bowl. Arrange tomato slices in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet and sprinkle garlic mixture evenly over top. Let sit at room temperature at least 30 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Toss chickpeas and vinegar in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Mash chickpeas with a fork until about half are smashed. Add shallot, parsley, and oil and toss to combine; season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
Combine cucumber, yogurt, mint, and parsley in a medium bowl; season with hot sauce, salt, and pepper. Let sit at room temperature at least 15 minutes.
Do Ahead: Yogurt sauce can be made 1 hour ahead. Cover and chill.

Whisk baking powder, sugar, 2 cups flour, and 2 tsp. salt in a large bowl. Add yogurt and stir to combine (the yogurt’s acidity ensures a tender texture). Transfer dough to a lightly floured work surface and knead until mostly smooth, about 1 minute. Divide into 4 pieces, cover with plastic wrap, and let rest 15 minutes (this will make dough easier to roll).

Working one at a time, roll out each piece of dough into a round about ⅛" thick. (Don’t stress: They don’t need to be perfect.) Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium. Working one at a time, cook rounds of dough until underside is golden brown and flatbread is beginning to puff, about 2 minutes. Flip and cook until other side is golden brown, about 1 minute longer; transfer to a plate. Repeat with remaining oil and rounds of dough. Let cool slightly.
Top each flatbread with yogurt sauce, chickpea mixture, and tomatoes. Drizzle with more oil and season well with salt and pepper.

fancy-grilled-cheese-with-a-fried-egg.name: Fancy Grilled Cheese With A Fried Egg
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Heat a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium. Butter one side of each slice of bread and place 4 slices in skillet, buttered side down. Top bread with cheese, reduce heat to low, and cook until underside is golden brown and cheese is melted, about 4 minutes.
Top with remaining bread, buttered side up, turn sandwiches and cook until second side is golden brown, about 2 minutes. Transfer sandwiches to a rimmed baking sheet and place in oven to keep warm.
Melt remaining 2 Tbsp. butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Crack eggs into skillet; season with salt and pepper. Cook until whites are set but yolks are still runny, about 2 minutes.
Drizzle sandwiches with honey and top each with a fried egg.

fanouropita-greek-st-fanourios-cake.name: Fanouropita (greek St. Fanourios Cake)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 12-inch round springform pan.

Combine oil, juice, and brandy in a large bowl. Stir in sugar. Combine flour, baking powder, and baking soda in another bowl; sift into oil-sugar mixture. Fold in walnuts, raisins, cinnamon, and cloves until well combined. Add batter to the prepared pan; level top. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 45 to 60 minutes.

fasting-apple-pie-argiro.name: Fasting Apple Pie
instructions: Add the raisins to briquette first, pour them with the cognac and heat in low heat.
Remove from the house and cover with membrane. Let the raisins soak and puff for 10 minutes.
We grind the nuts in the blender.
Clean the apples with a knife and cut them to 4 and cut them into think slides each quarter.
We sprinkle themm with lemon juice.
Brush the Leaf with olive oil or seed oil and sauté the crumbs.
Sprinkle with 1 pinch of cinnamon.
Allow them to brown for 2-3 ́ and add them to the apples, as well as the nuts and sugar (keep 4 tabletspons for the leaves).
Drain the raisins and add them to the filling.
Mix the filling very well.
Preheat the oven to 200oC. We spread paper on the counter.
Place a sheet on it, oil with a brush and sprinkle with some sugar.
Repeat the same with the rest of the cards.
After laying the 6 sets on top of each other, empty half the filling along.
Close the side of the Leaf and wrap our pie in a roll.
Make sure that the Leaf compound is down.
Add some oil on the outside and transfer the pie to a baking pan.
In the same way we make the second roll.
Bake for 25 minutes until the leaves are well browned.
Once they are removed from the oven, let them stand for 5’ and then steam with powder and cinnamon sugar.
Cut each roll into 6 pieces and serve while warm.

fasting-cariocas-argiro.name: Fasting Cariocas
instructions: Add the first four interredients (sugar, water, cocoa, cinnamon) into a pot, mix to dissolve cocoa and sugar and let the syrup bottle for 2 minutes.
Lower the syrup from the fire.
Let it cool.

fat-rice.name: Fat Rice

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
. (or more) sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: oil-cured black olives, green Spanish olives, pickled chiles (such as serrano or jalapeño), pickled sweet peppers (such as Peppadew or cherry), and thinly sliced scallions (for serving)

instructions: Gochugaru and fermented black beans can be found at Asian markets.
Whisk garlic, lemon juice, paprika, curry powder, and turmeric in a medium bowl; add chicken and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 6 hours.
DO AHEAD: Chicken can be marinated 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Bring raisins, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a small saucepan, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until liquid evaporates, 8–10 minutes.
Raisins can be prepared 3 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add bell peppers and onion; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until softened, 8–10 minutes. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are caramelized, 45–60 minutes.
Add garlic and tomato paste to skillet and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until tomato paste begins to darken, 10–15 minutes longer. Mix in vinegar and paprika; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Soffritto can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill.

Remove chicken from marinade; season with salt and pepper. Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a heavy 5–6-qt. pot with a lid over medium-high heat. Cook chicken, skin side down, until skin is brown and crisp, 10–12 minutes; transfer to a plate. (You can remove bones at this point, if desired.)
Reduce heat to medium. Add chorizo to pot and cook, stirring often, until crisp, about 2 minutes; transfer to a small bowl.

Add soffritto to pot and cook, stirring constantly, until sizzling, about 1 minute. Add broth, scraping up any browned bits; season with salt (salting liquid adequately here is important for flavorful rice). Add rice, sausage, chorizo, and raisins. Stir and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, arrange chicken on top, cover pot, and simmer gently, until rice is tender, 20–25 minutes. Uncover; increase heat to medium-high. Drizzle remaining 2 Tbsp. oil around edges of pot and cook, undisturbed, until underside of rice is crunchy, about 5 minutes longer.

While rice is cooking, mix garlic, fermented beans, if using, cilantro stems, and chiles in a small bowl. Peel prawns, leaving heads and tails on. Devein, stuff cut side with garlic mixture, and set aside.

Combine clams and wine in a large skillet, cover, and cook over high heat, stirring often, until clams open (discard any that do not open), about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer clams to a large bowl.

Reduce heat to medium-low. Lightly season prawns with salt and cook in same skillet until opaque in the centers, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer prawns to bowl with clams; pour pan juices into a small bowl.
DO AHEAD: Prawns can be stuffed 1 hour ahead. Cover and chill.
Mix gochugaru, cayenne, and salt in a small bowl. Dip cut sides of lemon wedges into seasoning mix.
Top rice with prawns and clams and drizzle with reserved pan juices. Top with lemon wedges, eggs, olives, pickled chiles and peppers, and scallions.

firehouse-chili-and-cornbread-casserole.name: Firehouse Chili And Cornbread Casserole
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over high heat. Add ground beef, onion, and salt. Cook and stir with a wooden spoon or spatula until meat is browned and crumbled into small pieces, about 5 minutes. Stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes. Add poblano pepper, garlic, chili powder, cumin, black pepper, cayenne, and oregano; cook, stirring, for 2 to 3 minutes.

Stir in diced tomatoes and crushed tomatoes. Measure water using the empty tomato cans and pour into the pot. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally, then reduce heat to medium-low. Let simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes before stirring in kidney beans. Continue simmering until bubbling and fragrant, about 30 minutes more. Taste for seasoning and adjust.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place a deep 9x13-inch baking dish on a baking sheet. Transfer chili to the dish, being sure to leave at least 1 inch of space at the top. Stir to evenly distribute.

Make crust: Whisk together corn muffin mix, 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, milk, and eggs in a large bowl until smooth. Spoon batter evenly over chili until the surface is covered. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cornbread crust is browned and a toothpick inserted into crust comes out clean, about 30 minutes.
Spoon or ladle into a dish and garnish with sour cream and cilantro.

fish-and-corn-cakes-with-tartar-sauce.name: Fish And Corn Cakes With Tartar Sauce

ingredients.item: Finely chopped cornichons or dill pickle
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Skinless firm white fish fillets (such as cod
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Mix mayonnaise, cornichons, mustard, lemon juice, and sugar in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Tartar sauce can be made 2 days ahead; cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 400°. Place fish on a rimmed baking sheet and rub with oil; season generously with salt and pepper. Roast until fish flakes easily, 8–10 minutes; let cool. Using a fork, break fish into large pieces; set aside.

Whisk egg, mayonnaise, and lemon zest in a large bowl. Add fish, corn, chives, and ½ cup panko; season with salt and pepper and mix gently to combine. Gently form ¼-cupfuls of mixture into ¾”-thick patties (you should have 12). Chill on a parchment-lined baking sheet until firm, 30–35 minutes.

Place remaining 1½ cups panko in a shallow bowl; season with salt and pepper. Coat patties in seasoned panko, pressing gently to adhere. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Working in batches, cook patties until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side. (If panko begins to burn between batches, wipe out skillet and start with new oil.) Transfer patties to a wire rack and season with salt.
Serve with tartar sauce and lemon wedges for squeezing over.
DO AHEAD: Patties can be formed (but not coated in panko or cooked) 12 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

fish-and-shrimp-casserole-teleculinaria.name: Fish And Shrimp Casserole
instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com um pouco de azeite, a cebola, os alhos e a cenoura, tudo picado, e cozinhe por cerca de 5 minutos.
Add the fish, previously cleaned skin and spines, shrimp and peas and let cook, in mild heat. Season with salt and pepper and remove from the fire.

At the bottom of an oven tray, place half the mashed potatoes and then the fish and shrimp preparation. Cover with the rest of the mashed and brushed egg. Take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 20 minutes.

five-spice-short-rib-and-daikon-soup.name: Five-spice Short Rib And Daikon Soup

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: leaves with tender stems picked, coarsely chopped

instructions: Pat dry 2 lb. bone-in beef short ribs. Separate meat from bones and cut into ½" pieces; set bones aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Cook one 2" piece ginger, scrubbed, thinly sliced, and 2 garlic cloves, smashed, stirring often, until golden, about 4 minutes. Push ginger and garlic to one side of pot and add short rib meat and reserved bones. Cook, turning occasionally, until meat and bones are lightly browned, 5–7 minutes. Stir in 1 medium onion, thinly sliced, and 1 bunch scallions, trimmed, halved crosswise, and cook until heated through, about 2 minutes.

Add 1 large daikon (about 1 lb.), peeled, cut into ½" pieces, 2 bay leaves, 1 cup michiu or dry sake, 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 2 tsp. five-spice powder, 2 tsp. ground white pepper, 1 tsp. MSG, and 8 cups water. Stir to combine and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer, cover pot, and cook until beef and daikon are tender and flavors have melded, 40–50 minutes. Skim fat from soup; remove and discard bay leaves, scallions, and bones (if desired). Taste and add more salt and/or white pepper if needed.
Ladle soup into bowls. Top with 1 bunch cilantro, leaves with tender stems picked, coarsely chopped, and drizzle with toasted sesame oil.

flat-iron-steak-with-mushroom-sauce.name: Flat Iron Steak With Mushroom Sauce
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Season both sides flat iron steak with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder. Heat a heavy, oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat; add 2 teaspoons vegetable oil and heat until oil shimmers. Add steak; sear until well browned, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer steak to a plate.

Reduce heat to medium; add remaining 1 teaspoon vegetable oil to skillet. Add mushrooms; cook and stir until wilted and browned, about 10 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low; add wine to skillet and bring to a boil. Cook until wine is slightly reduced, 3 to 5 minutes; add beef stock and bring to a simmer.
Mash butter and flour in a small bowl into a paste using a fork; stir into mushroom mixture and simmer until sauce is thickened, about 5 minutes. Return flat iron steak to the skillet.
Cook in the preheated oven until steak is barely pink inside, about 10 minutes. Cut steak into thin slices on the diagonal against the grain; place on a platter.
Stir cream into mushroom sauce until heated through, 1 to 2 minutes; pour over steak and garnish with chives.

focaccia-recipe-argiro.name: Focaccia Recipe

ingredients.item: 1⁄2 g dry or 8 gr fresh yeast
1⁄2 g dry or 8 gr fresh yeast

instructions: Add the flower to a bowl and add the dried yeast. Mix with a spoon.
Dissolve the salt well with a sponge in the lukewarm water.
Add the water and olive oil.
With a Spoon or Fingers, mix the materials clinically from the center to the outside.
The dough is very wet and sticks to the hands. Work the dough with the ringers joining. At the end of the dough you will have a wet sticky dough.

french-fruit-tart-galette-argiro.name: French Fruit Tart (galette)

ingredients.item: 180 gr very cold butter cut into small pieces (pea size)
Some crystalline sugar for leaf sprinkler
500 gr fresh fruit (apples, fresh vanillas, strawberries, apricots, nectarines, Cherries, plums fresh)
180 gr very cold butter cut into small pieces (pea size)
Some crystalline sugar for leaf sprinkler
500 gr fresh fruit (apples, fresh vanillas, strawberries, apricots, nectarines, Cherries, plums fresh)

instructions: For this fruit tart, the French galette, the tart dough must work fairly before it can melt the butter.
In the mixer cutters or bowl with 2 knives, cut the flower with salt and cold butter.
Drizzle with cold water to wet the dough and shake the bowl to get well wet.
Spread the membrane, empty the dough and press to become a plate disc.
Cover with membrane and store for 30′ in the refrigerator to freeze. Covered up to 4 weeks in the freezer.
Preheat the oven to 200oC.
Place non-stick baking paper on a baking pan.
To open the tart sprinkle icing sugar on the counter to touch the dough there.
Sprinkle the surface of the dough again.
With a dick mold, spread the leaf in 3 mm kick and about 25 cm in diameter.
Put the duck on the baking pan on the baking paper.
Leave a gap around the dough 5 cm.
Sprinkle with almond ground in powder.

french-toast-turkey-sandwich.name: French Toast Turkey Sandwich

ingredients.prep: leftover sliced turkey, and arugula leaves (for serving)

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Sprinkle bacon with brown sugar and pepper; transfer to a wire rack set inside a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and bake until browned and crisp, 20–25 minutes. Let cool.
Whisk eggs, milk, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt in a large baking dish. Add bread slices and let sit, turning to coat, until bread has absorbed most of the liquid, about 5 minutes.
Melt 1 Tbsp. butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook 2 slices of bread until golden brown, about 3 minutes per side. Repeat with remaining 1 Tbsp. butter and 2 slices of bread.
Assemble sandwiches using leftover cranberry sauce, leftover turkey, arugula, and bacon, and cut in half.

fresh-dill-cucumbers-with-lemon.name: Fresh Dill Cucumbers With Lemon
instructions: Combine cucumbers, dill, and salt in a medium bowl; season with pepper and toss to coat. Cover and chill 30 minutes.
Drain cucumbers and place in a clean bowl. Top with lemon zest and juice.
Do Ahead: Cucumbers can be salted up to 4 hours ahead. Keep chilled.

fresh-grape-and-champagne-sorbet.name: Fresh Grape And Champagne Sorbet
instructions: Puree 4 cups grapes in blender. Combine Champagne, sugar, juice concentrate, 1/4 cup water, and cinnamon in bowl; add 1 1/2 cups grape puree (reserve any remaining puree for another use). Stir until sugar dissolves.
Process mixture in ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer to container. Cover and freeze until firm, at least 4 hours and up to 2 days.
Serve sorbet in Champagne coupes; garnish with additional grapes, if desired.

fresh-strawberry-layer-cake.name: Fresh Strawberry Layer Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
Combine milk, vinegar, and vanilla extract in another bowl.

Beat sugar and lard together in a mixing bowl using an electric mixer until creamy. Add eggs and beat to combine. Beat in flour mixture alternately with milk mixture and strawberry puree, making 3 dry and 2 wet additions. Beat for 1 minute. Pour evenly into the prepared pans.
Drop cake pans 2 to 3 times on the countertop to break any air bubbles.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the centers of the cakes comes out clean, 30 to 40 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool on wire racks for 10 minutes. Turn cakes out onto the rack to cool completely, 15 to 30 minutes more.
Ice cooled cake using vanilla frosting between the layers and on the top and sides.

fried-bread-and-butter-pickles-with-gree.name: Fried Bread-and-butter Pickles With Green Goddess Dressing
instructions: Puree first 7 ingredients in blender until only tiny flecks of herbs remain. Transfer to medium bowl. Add mayonnaise; whisk to blend well. Mix in 1/4 teaspoon salt. Season dressing to taste with cayenne pepper. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour. DO AHEAD Dressing can be made 2 days ahead. Keep refrigerated.
Whisk buttermilk and hot pepper sauce in another medium bowl to blend. Add drained pickles; soak at least 20 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Whisk cornmeal, black pepper, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt in third medium bowl. Sprinkle some of cornmeal mixture over rimmed baking sheet. Lift 1 pickle slice from buttermilk. Place in cornmeal, turning and pressing gently to coat. Transfer to prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining pickles and cornmeal. DO AHEAD Can be made 30 minutes ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Add enough vegetable oil to large deep skillet to reach depth of 1 inch. Lean deep-fry thermometer on angle in skillet with bulb submerged. Heat oil over medium heat to 177°C. Working in batches, fry pickles until deep golden brown, turning occasionally, 2 to 3 minutes (return oil to 177°C between batches). Using slotted spoon, carefully transfer fried pickles to paper towels to drain.
Spoon 3/4 cup dressing into small bowl. Place bowl on platter. Arrange warm pickles on platter around dressing.

fried-pickle-dogs.name: Fried Pickle Dogs

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Slice dill pickles lengthwise into strips. Place flour in a dish. Combine eggs and 1 tablespoon mustard in a second dish. Combine cornmeal, salt, and pepper in a third dish.

Heat canola oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Dip a pickle slice in the flour, egg, and cornmeal mixtures. Place in the hot oil. Fry until golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Turn and cook the other side until golden, about 2 to 3 minutes more. Remove from skillet and place on paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining pickle slices. Pour off most of the oil; reserve the rest in the pan for frying hot dogs.

Fill a saucepan with water and bring to a boil. Place hot dogs in boiling water, remove from heat, and let stand for 5 minutes. Remove hot dogs from water and let cool slightly. Wrap each hot dog with a strip of bacon, securing with a toothpick if desired.
Heat skillet with reserved oil over medium heat. Fry bacon-wrapped hot dogs until bacon is crispy, turning occasionally, 5 to 7 minutes.
Spread remaining mustard on a toasted bun and top with a bacon-wrapped hot dog. Tuck in slices of fried pickle. Repeat with remaining mustard, buns, hot dogs, and pickles.

fried-rice-soy-spice-and-everything-nice.name: Fried Rice: Soy, Spice, And Everything Nice
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the tofu and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated tofu and cook until golden and crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove the tofu from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the kimchi and cook until heated through, about 3 minutes.
In a small nonstick pan, fry the eggs over easy, about 2 minutes.
Add the cauliflower rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Top with the fried eggs and serve.
Enjoy!

fried-scallops-on-kiwi-bulgur-cake-lezze.name: Fried Scallops On Kiwi Bulgur Cake
fried-scallops-on-kiwi-bulgur-cake-lezze.original_name: Kivili Bulgur Keki On Sea Tarağı Pan
instructions: 1. Fine bulguru mouth can be closed a rough and add boiling water and close the cover tightly.
2.  20 dakika bekletin.
3. Peel and rub the peel of potatoes.
4. Find the bark of boiled potatoes and oranges, reinde to the i&ccedil.
5. 10 minutes.
6. As for the destruction of the Mac, red powder pepper (sweet) and salted, and a stretch film broadcast in a thin layer.
7. Kiviyi is a rough little cube in shape.
8. Reinde white cheese on it.
9. Add walnut and phenol.
10. This blend is hungry place it in the middle of the bulgur cake and wrap push into rolls with the help of stretch film.
11. 11. 11. 11. Stretch film crackfree.
12. Fixin and nonstick fry in the pan.
12. August Cook the oiled paper into the oven tray and bake it up to 10 minutes in the oven set to 180 degrees.
14 July Heat the pan.
15. Slowly add butter when it starts to boil light.
16. Tighten and add lemon juice.
17. September Relate the bark of lemon.
18. Get from the stove after taking the Tuzla taste and consistency.
19. September Garlic, ginger and cough fine coast.
20. Salt and fresh & grazed; tauted black pepper and marinate with garlic mixture, olive oil and lemon juice.
21. Goodly heated non-stick cook two sides in the pans of the pan.
22. Take Bulgur cake service plate.
23. Place sea combs on the car.
24. Serve with butter lemon sauce.

fried-tomato-sauce-in-thermomix-pequerec.name: Fried Tomato Sauce In Thermomix
fried-tomato-sauce-in-thermomix-pequerec.original_name: Salsa de tomate frito en Thermomix
instructions: Wash the tomatoes and cut them into quarters. Peels and pits ion and garlic.
Put the tomatoes into the thermomix glass and tighten for 5 seconds at Speed 5.
Add onion, garlic and olive oil and program the thermomix at speed 1, Varoma temperature, for 10 minutes.
Add the teaspoon of Sugar and pat to aste. Mix for 10 seconds at 6.
Reprogram the Thermomix at velocity 1, Varoma temperature, for 40 minutes (without put the cube to reduce and weigh).
At the end, check the consistency and flavour of the salsa and, if necessary, adjust the salt and pepper to your taste.
Finally, tighten the willow for 30 seconds at speed 8 so that it's fine.

frisee-apple-salad.name: Frisée-apple Salad

ingredients.prep: quartered, cored, cut into matchstick-size strips

instructions: Combine lemon juice, chopped shallots, and grated lemon peel in small bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season dressing to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewhisk before using.
Combine frisée, endive, apples, radishes, and parsley in large bowl. Toss salad with dressing and serve.

fruit-salad-with-watermelon-lezzet.name: Fruit Salad With Watermelon
instructions: 1. Leave water, sugar and lemon juice in a small bowl and cool.
2. Remove it by pushing for the long.
3. Take the cores and make the snowflake parts small.
4. slice the berries.
5.  Kivileri soyup dilimleyin.
6. Eat pineapple or orange as small as well.
7.   mix with the sauce that you prepare forMeyves and fill it into the snow and serve.

fun-mini-burgers-teleculinaria.name: Fun Mini Burgers
instructions: Take a frying pan to the fire with the olive oil and let it warm up a bit. Sprinkle the meatballs, season them with salt, add them to the frying pan and let them cook on both sides. Remove from the fire, have half the cheese slices on the burgers and book.

Open the loaves in half, put them in the oven at 200oC for about 2 minutes, remove, bar the lower halves with mayonnaise and ketchup, dispose of the lettuce leaves, tomatoes cut into slices and then burgers.

Cut the remaining slices of cheese into rounded rectangles at the tips and take a risk in the center with a little ketchup. Have some bread with one end over the meat and one tip out of the bread, as you see in the picture. Put the other bread halves over and decorate with the friar beans.
